description_long: This object is a pump-action shotgun featuring a long, cylindrical barrel with a dark metallic finish and a wooden stock and fore-end. The stock is full-sized, crafted from polished wood with a rich brown grain, and extends into a robust receiver. The fore-end, also wooden, is ribbed for grip and situated beneath the barrel, indicating a pump-action mechanism. The trigger guard is rounded and metallic, providing protection for the trigger while allowing ample space for finger placement. The barrel is smooth and unvented, with a simple bead sight at the muzzle. Overall, the shotgun exhibits a classic, utilitarian design suitable for both sporting and defensive use.
description: A pump-action shotgun with a long, dark metal barrel and polished wooden stock and fore-end, featuring a rounded trigger guard and classic design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, highlighting the wooden stock, fore-end, and the long, dark barrel.
description_view_1: Rear view focusing on the butt of the wooden stock and the alignment of the barrel, with the trigger guard partially visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the full profile of the shotgun, including the pump fore-end and the smooth barrel.
description_view_3: Front view emphasizing the muzzle of the barrel, the ribbed fore-end, and the shape of the stock.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, smooth and unvented, with a bead sight at the muzzle
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized metallic guard with a smooth contour and no visible finger grooves
